description:
Created from bare go intent:

Fix installed stack-update source resolution

1. Honor GO_STACK when resolving immutable release tags from an installed go-workflow command.
2. Prevent site-packages from being treated as a Git checkout for stack update.
3. Add a regression test that updates a template through the installed-style runtime path.
4. Release and install the fix, then resume the blocked go-project-template pin.

requested_outcomes.text: Honor GO_STACK when resolving immutable release tags from an installed go-workflow command.
Prevent site-packages from being treated as a Git checkout for stack update.
Add a regression test that updates a template through the installed-style runtime path.
Release and install the fix, then resume the blocked go-project-template pin.

decomposition_policy.rule: List numbering is acceptance coverage, not an automatic task boundary.

acceptance: R1: Honor GO_STACK when resolving immutable release tags from an installed go-workflow command.
R2: Prevent site-packages from being treated as a Git checkout for stack update.
R3: Add a regression test that updates a template through the installed-style runtime path.
R4: Release and install the fix, then resume the blocked go-project-template pin.
All requested outcomes are verified or explicitly blocked with evidence.

evidence.summary: R1-R3 verified: GO_STACK honored, site-packages rejected as checkout, installed-style regression green. v0.3.7 release preflight passed with 92 tests and template pairing; annotated tag, GitHub release, local install, and v0.3.7 template follow-up proceed from the release commit.
